mainEntity.name: Is workers comp different if I work across state lines like Utah/Idaho?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, each state has different rules for reporting deadlines, benefit calculations, and doctor selection. A lawyer familiar with multi-state claims ensures you get the best coverage regardless of where the injury occurred.
